sentences.text: The boy looked toward space.
I am interested in space.

sentences.target: Тэр сансар маш уудам гэж бодов.
sentences.text: Space is very vast.

The sun rose in the morning.

The children played under the sun.
Earth goes around the sun.
Our Earth is beautiful.
We live on Earth.
The moon is bright tonight.
The moon came up over the mountain.
The moon looked small.
The sky is clear.
I saw the blue sky.
In the evening the sky became red.
Today is a sunny day.
We walked on a sunny morning.
This room is sunny.
A white cloud is in the sky.
A cloud covered the sun.
I saw a big cloud.
There was a lot of fog in the morning.
Fog covered the road.
We walked in the fog.
The sky is cloudy today.
A cloudy day is cool.
Tomorrow may be cloudy.
It is raining outside.
After the rain, the ground is wet.
I hear the rain.
A lot of snow falls in winter.
The snow is white.
The children played on the snow.
Lightning flashed at night.
The child got scared when he saw lightning.
Lightning sounded far away.
There was a strong storm in the evening.
The storm moved the trees.
We stayed home until the storm passed.
A small accident happened on the road.

sentences.target: Тэр осол болсны дараа цагдаа ирэв.
sentences.text: After the accident, the police came.
He saw the accident and stopped.
After heavy rain, there was a flood.

People moved away from the flood.
The lake is calm.
We sat on the shore of the lake.
This lake is very blue.
The ocean looks blue from far away.
I want to see the ocean.
The wind is strong over the ocean.

We put a bridge over the canal.
The river is flowing fast.
Our home is near the river.
The children went to the river.
The waterfall is loud.
We saw a waterfall in the mountains.
The waterfall sprayed cold water.
My body feels good today.
Rest if your body hurts.

My head hurts.

The child shook his head.
My neck is stiff.
She wore a scarf around her neck.
A bird with a long neck stood in the water.
My throat hurts.
Cold water cooled the throat.

He stood on his feet.
The child played soccer.
I washed my hands.
He raised his right arm.
Mom held my hand.

The child raised one finger.
My shoulder hurts.

My skin is dry.

Exercise strengthens muscle.

I rinsed my mouth.
Her mouth is small.

The doctor looked at the tongue.

I brush my teeth in the morning.
The child's teeth are white.
My stomach is hungry.
Too much food makes the stomach hurt.
The child's stomach is warm.
It is nice to breathe fresh air.
He tried to breathe slowly.
After running, it was hard to breathe.
I yawn a lot in the evening.
The child got sleepy and began to yawn.
Do not yawn in class.
I cough a lot in winter.
He slept at night without coughing.
When you catch a cold, it is easy to cough.
Because of the dust, I began to sneeze.

sentences.target: Тэр нэг удаа найтаах гэж байв.
sentences.text: She was about to sneeze once.
Sneezing is common when you have a cold.
Dad sometimes snores at night.
A tired person can snore easily.
She woke from the sound of snoring.
Spitting in the street is unpleasant.
The doctor gave a cup to spit water into.

sentences.target: Тэр хоол гашуун тул нулимах шахав.
sentences.text: The food was bitter, so he almost spat it out.
The baby needed to poop.
The dog went outside to poop.
The child washed his hands after pooping.
The child laughed when he accidentally farted.
When the stomach is bloated, farting happens.
He felt embarrassed that he might fart.
The sick child almost vomited.

sentences.target: Муу хоол идээд бөөлжих нь бий.
sentences.text: You may vomit after eating bad food.
He was about to vomit in the car.

sentences.target: Энэ жирэмслэлтийн үед ээж их амардаг.
sentences.text: During pregnancy, a mother rests a lot.

sentences.target: Эмч жирэмслэлт сайн явж байна гэв.
sentences.text: The doctor said the pregnancy is going well.

sentences.target: Түүний жирэмслэлт гэр бүлд баяр авчирлаа.
sentences.text: The pregnancy brought joy to the family.
My older sister is pregnant.

sentences.target: Нэг жирэмсэн эмэгтэй сандал дээр суулаа.
sentences.text: The pregnant woman sat on a chair.
She rests a lot because she is pregnant.
My sister is going to give birth soon.
She went to the hospital to give birth.

sentences.target: Хүүхэд төрөх өдөр бүгд баяртай байв.
sentences.text: Everyone was happy on the day the baby was born.

sentences.text: The monster lived behind the mountain.

sentences.text: I feel like I am falling in love with this city.

sentences.target: Нэг том нохой хаалганы дэргэд байна.
sentences.text: A big dog is near the door.

sentences.text: Cars go slowly on the narrow street.

sentences.text: Our city seems to grow every year.

sentences.target: Бага байх үед би энд амьдардаг байв.
sentences.text: When I was small, I lived here.

sentences.text: I apologized for saying the wrong thing.

sentences.text: Mother is going to make dinner.

sentences.target: Хэрэв бороо орвол би гэртээ байна.
sentences.text: If it rains, I will stay home.

sentences.target: Хэрэв цаг байвал над руу залга.
sentences.text: If you have time, call me.

sentences.target: Би энэ хоолыг хэрхэн хийх вэ?
sentences.text: How do I make this food?

sentences.target: Ээж надад сайхан мэдээ хэлэх гэж байна.
sentences.text: Mother is going to tell me good news.
